title: Button Component
content:
## Button Component The `Button` component is a reusable UI element that provides styled buttons with various variants and sizes. It leverages `class-variance-authority` for efficient styling and `radix-ui/react-slot` for potential composition. ### Key Exports * **`Button`**: The main React component for rendering buttons. It accepts standard button attributes along with `variant` and `size` props. * **`buttonVariants`**: A `class-variance-authority` function that generates CSS classes based on `variant` and `size` props. ### Props #### `ButtonProps` * **`variant`**: (Optional) Defines the visual style of the button. Options include: * `default` * `destructive` * `outline` * `secondary` * `ghost` * `link` * **`size`**: (Optional) Defines the size of the button. Options include: * `default` * `sm` * `lg` * `icon` * **`asChild`**: (Optional, boolean) If true, renders the button as a `Slot` component from Radix UI, allowing for composition. * **`className`**: (Optional) Additional CSS classes to apply to the button. * **`...props`**: All other standard `React.ButtonHTMLAttributes`. ### Usage Example ```jsx import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'; function MyComponent() { return (
); } ```
